name: Pasta with Spinach Chiffonade in Chicken Brot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over moderate heat.
2. Add the chopped garlic and cook until it sizzles.
3. Add the spinach strips to the skillet and sauté just until they wilt, about 30 seconds.
4. Pour in the reduced chicken broth (ensure you have boiled 4 cups of stock down to 2 cups).
5. Return the sauce to a simmer.
6. Spoon the hot sauce over the cooked spaghetti or linguine.
7. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and season with freshly ground black pepper to taste.
